creator: admin@support.od.ua
text:
Freshly installed VM machine FreeBSD 12.3-STABLE (2GB RAM, x6 CPU core) in Virtualbox running on Windows 10.

# env | grep -i shell
SHELL=/bin/csh

# uname -a
FreeBSD vb-12-3 12.3-STABLE FreeBSD 12.3-STABLE #0 r371020M: Tue Nov 16 03:13:07 EET 2021     root@vb-12.3:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/vb-12.3.1  amd64


env ASSUME_ALWAYS_YES=yes pkg update
pkg update
pkg install -y ca_root_nss gitup
sed -i '.backup' "s,stable/12,stable/13," /usr/local/etc/gitup.conf
gitup stable

# Target Directory: /usr/src
# Have: 4ec4cd727bd0f25240e017faa50da6635b8bc442
# Low memory mode: Yes
# Want: 4ec4cd727bd0f25240e017faa50da6635b8bc442
# Branch: stable/13

cd /usr/src
make clean

```
...

rm -f legacy_test legacy_test.tmp Kyuafile Kyuafile.tmp
rm -rf checkdir
rm -f Kyuafile Kyuafile.tmp
rm -rf checkdir
rm -f Kyuafile Kyuafile.tmp
rm -rf checkdir
```
